title: Suno leans into customization with v5.5
description:
Slop yourself. | Image: Suno	

Suno just released one of its biggest updates yet with v5.5 of its AI music model. Where previous updates focused mostly on improving fidelity and creating more natural vocals, v5.5 is about giving users more control. It includes three new features: Voices, My Taste, and Custom Models.
In the release notes, Suno says that Voices is its most requested feature. It lets users train the vocal model on their own voice. They can upload clean accapellas, finished tracks with backing music, or just sing directly into the mic on their phone or laptop. The cleaner and higher quality the recording, the less data is required. And to prevent someone fro …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Suno가 AI 음악 모델 v5.5를 출시하며 사용자 맞춤화에 중점을 둔 업데이트를 진행했습니다. 새로운 기능으로 사용자 음성 학습 기능인 Voices, My Taste, Custom Models가 포함되었습니다. 이전 버전보다 사용자 제어권을 크게 향상시켰습니다.
summary_en: Suno released v5.5 of its AI music model with a focus on user customization rather than just quality improvements. The update includes three new features: Voices for training vocal models on user's voice, My Taste, and Custom Models. This represents a shift toward giving users more control over AI-generated content.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 음성 기술을 활용한 개인화된 마케팅 콘텐츠 제작 가능성을 탐색해볼 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can explore personalized marketing content creation using AI voice technology for enhanced customer engagement.
key_points: Suno v5.5 focuses on customization over quality
New Voices feature allows user voice training
Shift toward user-controlled AI content generation

title: Why can’t TikTok identify AI generated ads when I can?
description:
Samsung, like many companies using generative AI in their advertising, hasn’t placed an AI label on several videos shared through its TikTok accounts, and the fine print doesn’t always contain the answers. | Image by Samsung	

I've been struggling to tell whether the ads appearing in my TikTok feeds have been made with generative AI tools. As someone who spends a great deal of time scrutinizing images and videos for the usual "tells" that something was synthetically generated, some of the promotions I've seen have definitely sparked suspicion. For several weeks, I didn't see any examples with the AI disclosure required by TikTok's advertising policies, however, so I had no way of knowing for sure.
What irks me is that someone knows for sure if the content is AI-generated. They're just not telling the rest of us. And if companies that claim to support AI-labelling …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: TikTok에서 AI로 생성된 광고들이 적절한 라벨링 없이 게시되고 있어 투명성 문제가 제기되고 있습니다. 삼성을 포함한 많은 기업들이 생성형 AI를 광고에 사용하면서도 AI 표시를 하지 않고 있습니다. 플랫폼의 AI 광고 정책과 실제 집행 사이의 gap이 존재합니다.
summary_en: AI-generated advertisements on TikTok are appearing without proper labeling, raising transparency concerns. Companies including Samsung are using generative AI in advertising without AI disclosure despite TikTok's policies. There's a gap between platform AI advertising policies and actual enforcement.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 생성 콘텐츠 사용 시 투명성과 플랫폼 정책 준수를 통해 신뢰도를 유지해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must maintain transparency and comply with platform policies when using AI-generated content to preserve consumer trust.
key_points: AI ads lack proper disclosure on TikTok
Major brands not following AI labeling requirements
Gap between policy and enforcement exists

title: Why OpenAI killed Sora
description:
On Tuesday morning, everything was business as usual at OpenAI. By the end of the day, the company had announced that it would scrap its video-generation app, Sora, and reverse plans for video generation inside ChatGPT; it would wind down a $1 billion Disney deal; it would shuffle the role of a high-level executive; and it would raise an additional $10 billion from investors, adding up to more than $120 billion total for its latest funding round. 
OpenAI is now in a frenzy to turn a profit, or at least lose less money. Since its launch, Sora seems to have taken up a massive amount of compute without the financial return to justify it. Indus …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: OpenAI가 비디오 생성 앱 Sora를 중단하고 ChatGPT 내 비디오 생성 계획을 철회한다고 발표했습니다. 10억 달러 규모의 디즈니 계약도 종료하며 추가로 100억 달러를 투자 유치했습니다. Sora는 막대한 컴퓨팅 자원을 소모했지만 수익성을 입증하지 못했습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI announced it would discontinue its video-generation app Sora and reverse plans for video generation in ChatGPT. The company also wound down a $1 billion Disney deal while raising an additional $10 billion from investors. Sora consumed massive compute resources without justifying financial returns.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업은 AI 도구 도입 시 비용 대비 효과를 신중히 평가하고 수익성 있는 활용 방안을 우선시해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should carefully evaluate cost-effectiveness when adopting AI tools and prioritize profitable use cases over cutting-edge features.
key_points: OpenAI shutting down Sora video generation
$1 billion Disney deal terminated
High compute costs without sufficient ROI

title: These 9 Shoptalk Conversations Are Shaping Commerce’s Future
description: Three frenetic days at Shoptalk revealed tons of anxieties about the future of commerce—from uncertainty around what it will look like, big questions at companies like Home Depot and Stratacache, and big plays from powerhouses like Google and Meta.
summary_ko: Shoptalk 컨퍼런스에서 커머스 업계의 미래에 대한 다양한 우려가 드러났습니다. Home Depot, Stratacache 같은 기업들의 불확실성과 Google, Meta 등 거대 기술기업들의 공격적인 전략이 주요 화제였습니다. 3일간의 행사를 통해 커머스 생태계의 변화와 도전과제가 집중 조명되었습니다.
summary_en: The Shoptalk conference revealed widespread anxieties about the future of commerce across the industry. Major companies like Home Depot and Stratacache face significant uncertainties while tech giants Google and Meta make aggressive strategic moves. The three-day event highlighted the evolving challenges and transformations in the commerce ecosystem.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 Google과 Meta 같은 플랫폼 의존도를 줄이고 자체 커머스 역량을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should reduce platform dependency on Google and Meta while strengthening their own commerce capabilities.
key_points: Commerce industry faces widespread uncertainty about future direction
Major retailers like Home Depot experiencing strategic challenges
Tech giants Google and Meta making significant commerce plays
Industry transformation creating both opportunities and threats

title: Manhattan Associates: Only 7% of retailers reach unified commerce maturity
description:
A new benchmark study from Manhattan Associates finds that most specialty retailers continue to lag in connecting digital and physical commerce to create unified operations. The study classified just 7% of those retailers as “leaders” despite measurable gains in recent years. Manhattan Associates conducted the 2026 Global Unified Commerce Benchmark report with research firm Incisiv. […]
The post Manhattan Associates: Only 7% of retailers reach unified commerce maturity appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: Manhattan Associates의 연구에 따르면 전문 소매업체 중 단 7%만이 통합 커머스 성숙도에서 '리더' 수준에 도달했습니다. 대부분의 소매업체들이 디지털과 물리적 커머스를 연결하여 통합 운영을 구축하는데 여전히 뒤처지고 있습니다. 이 연구는 Manhattan Associates가 Incisiv와 함께 실시한 2026년 글로벌 통합 커머스 벤치마크 리포트의 결과입니다.
summary_en: A Manhattan Associates study found that only 7% of specialty retailers have achieved 'leader' status in unified commerce maturity. Most retailers continue to lag in connecting digital and physical commerce to create unified operations. The research was conducted by Manhattan Associates with Incisiv for the 2026 Global Unified Commerce Benchmark report.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 디지털과 오프라인 채널의 완전한 통합을 통해 경쟁 우위를 확보할 수 있는 기회가 있습니다. 통합 커머스 역량 강화가 차별화 요소가 될 것입니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands have an opportunity to gain competitive advantage through complete digital-physical channel integration. Building unified commerce capabilities will become a key differentiator.
key_points: Only 7% of specialty retailers achieve unified commerce leadership
Most retailers struggle with digital-physical commerce integration
Study conducted by Manhattan Associates with Incisiv
Significant maturity gap exists in retail commerce operations

title: The latest in data centers, AI, and energy
description:
Massive new data centers are the physical foundation for tech companies’ hopes and dreams for AI. But the rush to expand warehouses full of energy-hungry servers has also kicked up fights across the world over their impact on power grids, utility bills, nearby communities, and the environment. 
From audacious plans to launch data centers into space to the latest legal battles over pollution, The Verge has the biggest news and reporting surrounding data centers.


					
Senators are pushing to find out how much electricity data centers actually use
			
How the spiraling Iran conflict could affect data centers and electricity costs
			
Seven tech giants signed Trump’s pledge to keep electricity costs from spiking around data centers 
			
Trump claims tech companies will sign deals next week to pay for their own power supply
			
Anthropic says it’ll try to keep its data centers from raising electricity costs
			
How an ‘icepocalypse’ raises more questions about Meta’s biggest data center
summary_ko: AI 데이터센터 확장으로 인한 전력망 부담과 전기요금 인상 우려가 전 세계적으로 확산되고 있다. 트럭프는 기술기업들이 자체 전력공급 계약에 서명할 것이라고 발표했다. Anthropic과 7개 주요 기술기업들이 데이터센터 전력비용 급등 방지에 합의했다.
summary_en: The expansion of AI data centers is creating global concerns about power grid strain and rising electricity costs. Trump announced that tech companies will sign deals for their own power supply. Anthropic and seven major tech giants agreed to prevent electricity cost spikes around data centers.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 인프라 비용 상승이 클라우드 서비스 요금에 미치는 영향을 모니터링하고 에너지 효율적인 AI 솔루션을 우선 고려해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should monitor how rising AI infrastructure costs affect cloud service pricing and prioritize energy-efficient AI solutions.
key_points: AI data centers causing power grid strain globally
Tech giants pledging to manage electricity costs
Companies exploring self-powered data center solutions
Environmental and community impact concerns rising

title: P&G’s Pritchard on how brands must navigate a new epoch in marketing
description: The brand chief at one of the world’s largest advertisers explains how the company is tackling media fragmentation, digital commerce and the rise of AI.
summary_ko: 세계 최대 광고주 중 하나인 P&G의 브랜드 책임자가 마케팅의 새로운 시대 탐색 방법을 설명했다. 미디어 분산화, 디지털 커머스, AI 기술 부상에 대한 P&G의 대응 전략이 포함되었다. 원문에서 구체적인 전략 내용은 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: P&G's brand chief explained how the company navigates a new marketing epoch. The discussion covered P&G's approach to media fragmentation, digital commerce, and AI rise. Specific strategic details are not confirmed in the source.
so_what_ko: 대형 브랜드의 마케팅 전략 변화를 벤치마킹하여 D2C 기업도 미디어 분산화와 AI 마케팅에 대비한 통합적 접근이 필요하다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should benchmark major brand marketing transformations and develop integrated approaches to media fragmentation and AI marketing.
key_points: P&G addressing media fragmentation challenges
Digital commerce integration strategies
AI adoption in marketing operations

title: Campaign Trail: Billie designed a surreal world with women in mind
description: The Edgewell personal care brand’s in-house team created a fantastical, Willy Wonka-esque lab that swaps candy for clouds of shaving foam.
summary_ko: 개인용품 브랜드 Billie가 여성을 염두에 둔 초현실적 세계를 디자인했다. 사내팀이 사탕 대신 면도 거품 구름으로 가득한 윌리 웡카풍 환상적 실험실을 제작했다. Edgewell 소속 브랜드의 창의적 마케팅 캠페인이다.
summary_en: Personal care brand Billie designed a surreal world with women in mind. The in-house team created a fantastical Willy Wonka-esque lab filled with clouds of shaving foam instead of candy. This represents a creative marketing campaign by the Edgewell-owned brand.
so_what_ko: D2C 개인용품 브랜드들은 타겟 고객의 니즈를 반영한 창의적이고 몰입감 있는 브랜드 경험 설계가 중요하다.
so_what_en: D2C personal care brands should focus on creating immersive, creative brand experiences that reflect their target customers' specific needs.
key_points: Billie created surreal marketing world for women
In-house creative team execution
Willy Wonka-inspired fantastical lab concept
Focus on female-centric brand experience

title: Ticker: Versant Looking to Acquire Vox’s Podcast Division, According to Report
description: Rahel Solomon departs CNN, and Scott MacFarlane has a new home.
summary_ko: Versant가 Vox의 팟캐스트 부문 인수를 추진하고 있다고 보도되었다. CNN의 Rahel Solomon이 퇴사했고 Scott MacFarlane이 새로운 직장을 찾았다. 미디어 업계의 인사 변동과 인수합병 소식이다.
summary_en: Versant is reportedly looking to acquire Vox's podcast division. Rahel Solomon departed CNN and Scott MacFarlane found a new position. This represents media industry personnel changes and M&A activity.
so_what_ko: 팟캐스트 시장의 통합이 진행되고 있어 D2C 브랜드들은 오디오 마케팅 채널의 변화에 대비한 다각화 전략이 필요하다.
so_what_en: As podcast market consolidation continues, D2C brands need diversified strategies to adapt to changes in audio marketing channels.
key_points: Versant pursuing Vox podcast division acquisition
Media industry personnel changes ongoing
Podcast market consolidation activity
